item.action: Classify ordered AudioContext output timestamp sequences without confusing render progress with audible output.

progress.finding: Coherent monotonic advance in both AudioTimestamp clocks is bounded render-position evidence; zero-zero, stalled, regressing, malformed, and unsupported states remain distinct.
progress.verification: 9 deterministic assertions passed in isolated Node execution

item.handoff: Vercel Studio should capture at least two ordered getOutputTimestamp samples inside the direct diagnostic-pulse observation window, preserve raw values, and require separate audible or device-level evidence before claiming speaker output.
